title: Circle of trust Dirt Trapper Door mats Indoor & Outdoor Anthracite 60x90cm Doormat - Non Slip Rubber Back Floor Mat - Super Absorbent Heavy Duty Door Mat, Washable Door Mat Barrier Mat
features: Heavy Duty Indoor Outdoor Mat - Made of high quality 100% polypropylene, PVC rubber edge and non-slip thin backing that will sit completely flat on the floor, over the carpet and will not turn up at the corners.

Easy to Clean - durable door mats can perfectly catch the dirt and easy to clean by simply shaking out the dirt, then hoover and can be brushed, vacuumed, or easily washable to clean it. You would surprise to look at the mat new again.

Quick Absorbent - An absorbent and waterproof barrier mat is perfect for keeping your floors clean as the ribbed material helps scrape dirt and debris from shoes. Waterproof rubber backing prevents moisture leaks while keeping the mat in place.

Minimalist Design - the low profile design of the mat allows nearly any door to pass over with ease; choose the size in that complement your home décor, you can use for entryway, patio, kitchen, lobby, garage and other common space areas.

Circle of Trust door mat is backed by our unbeatable customer service and fast, reliable support you can count on. If you have any issues with either mat contact us today and we’ll gladly make it right.
description: Product Description WHY CHOOSE CIRCLE OF TRUST DOOR MAT Circle of Trust premium quality door mat welcomes you into your home & makes sure mud and dirt stay at the door. Dirt trapper mat keeps your floor and carpet cleaner, so you don't need to take out the vacuum so often. ANTI SLIP BACKING The anti-slip backing of a doormat is an essential feature that helps to keep the mat securely in place. PREMIUM QUALITY Our premium quality washable indoor non-slip mat is made of strong non-skid backing to help keep the mat firmly in place and avoid slippage. DIRT TRAPPER The polypropylene material make it effective at trapping dirt, mud, and moisture from shoes before it enters your home . ENTRANCE FLOOR MAT Circle of Trust entrance mats – are a great way to keep your floor cleaner and drier for longer. LOW PROFILE The Low Profile doormat is designed to fit under most doorways, ensuring a seamless transition from outside to inside. EASY TO CLEAN With easy and regular cleaning, a high-quality absorbent doormat can last for years, keeping your floors clean and dry. HIGHLY ABSORBENT The High-Quality Absorbent Doormat is known for its superior water-absorbing capabilities. VERSATILE USE Circle of Trust Doormats serve as a multi-functional item in households. They not only help in wiping the dirt and mud from shoes but also serve as an attractive decorative piece for the entryway. Moreover, they are used for drying wet shoes and can be used to create a barrier between the indoor and outdoor environment. Additionally, some doormats come with built-in mats that trap dirt, sand, and debris, making them an excellent solution for outdoor spaces as well. Overall, a doormat is a must-have item that not only adds to the aesthetics but also helps in maintaining hygiene and cleanliness in the house. INTENNSIFY THE ENTRANCE LOOK Circle of Trust indoor door mats made with premium material are durable and wear-resistant, doormat highlights water absorbance, quick-drying, low profile, dirt and mud resistance, and easy cleaning that satisfy your different demands for the doormat. It easily keeps your surroundings clean and dry and makes your home staying in comfortable.
